case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. JOHN L L TRINIDAD

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINIDAD, JOHN L L $8,948.28 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,948.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66762619)
